scripts.build: npm --workspace client run build && npm --workspace server run build
scripts.smoke:pages: PAGES_BASE=/qix/ VITE_WS_URL=ws://localhost:8787/ws npm run --workspace client build && npm run --workspace server build && MODE=pages PORT=8787 PREVIEW_PORT=4173 PAGES_BASE=/qix/ node scripts/smoke.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run smoke && npm run smoke:pages
